title: Layered panel assembly manifest
description: Manifest consumed by scripts/manga/assemble_from_bank.py — deterministic offline assembly of panels from a series image bank. Implements MANGA_LAYER_RENDER_CONTRACT_SPEC.md §4 (layer taxonomy + z-order) and §10 (composite placement math); layer semantics per MANGA_V5_LAYERED_ARCHITECTURE.md §7. Every layer carries mandatory provenance (REAL vs INTERIM) — the stub-as-done and interim-as-final drift classes are schema-blocked, not convention-blocked.

structural_plan_path.description: Optional path to a verified structural plan envelope consumed by the assembler for structural-first L2 placement.

structural_plan.description: Optional inline verified structural plan envelope consumed by the assembler for structural-first L2 placement.

layer_class.description: MANGA_LAYER_RENDER_CONTRACT_SPEC §4: L0 backdrop, L1 mid-distance anchors, L2 character, L3 close objects, L4 atmospheric overlay

asset.description: Path (repo-relative or absolute) to the layer image. For L1/L2/L3 this must be an RGBA cutout (hard alpha per §10 feathering policy).

bbox_pct.description: [x, y, w, h] as % of canvas — the archetype subject_placement_bbox contract (§5/§10). Required for L1/L2/L3. Ignored for L0 (fills canvas) and L4 (full-frame overlay).

z_order.description: L3 only (§4.4): above_L2 = object occludes character (cup blocking hand-tips); below_L2 = character occludes object (hand wrapping cup). Default above_L2 per object_inventory z_order_default.

z_override.description: Explicit z-index override; defaults derive from layer_class per §10 z-order table.

blend.description: §4.5: L4 uses screen for additive effects (steam, light shafts); alpha for opaque effects. Non-L4 layers are always alpha.

provenance.description: REAL = byte-verified render from the series bank / render cache. INTERIM = stand-in derived by cutout/procedural means pending a proper banked render. MANDATORY — assembler refuses manifests without it and stamps it into the output provenance table.

provenance_note.description: For INTERIM layers: what the stand-in was derived from and the exact command that produces the REAL replacement.

shot_type.description: Composition grammar shot register (establishing, dialogue_bust, reaction_emotion, etc.)

anchor_slot.description: L2 only: slot_id referencing L0 composition_meta.anchor_slots for grammar placement

structural_node_id.description: Optional L2 node_id inside panel structural_plan used to bind the asset to a verified structural character placement.

grounding.description: L2 grammar grounding ops (G4 contact shadow, G5 BOOK occluder)

params.description: Optional PIL derivation parameters (radius_px, top_hex, etc.)

derivation.description: L0 only: derive abstract stage from plate instead of full_render paste
